chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-32 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection No. 1 to 5 a/w reply as at “A”. 2) For hearing of main case. 17.02.2026. Mr. Saima Shahreen Abbasi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kamran Ahmed Khan, AAG. Mr. Faheem Hussain, DAG. Mr. Kamran, Advocate for Respondent. SIP Ismail Mir, P.S. Hyderi. SIP M. Aslam P.S. Shahrah-e-Noor Jehan. PI Nadeem Jamal SIU/CIA. ___________________ Comments have been filed on behalf of SSP Special Investigation Unit / CIA Karachi which is taken on record. SIP Ismail Mir, P.S. Hyderi, SIP M. Aslam P.S. Shahrah-e-Noor Jehan and PI Nadeem Jamal SIU/CIA are present in Court and has categorically stated that they have not in the past and neither in future intimate or harass the Petitioner. The proceedings if any, to be taken against the Petitioner strictly in accordance with law. With that undertaking the Petitioner is satisfied and Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Arshad/
